items.title: Campus Library Hours Extended (1)
items.passage: Starting next semester, the main campus library will extend weekday hours until midnight during exam periods. The change responds to student requests for safer and quieter study spaces after evening classes. Laptop loans and group rooms can be reserved through the library app. Staff remind students that extended hours do not reduce the need for sleep.

items.title: Remote Internships Gain Popularity (2)
items.passage: A recent survey shows that more undergraduates choose remote internships. Students value flexible schedules and lower commuting costs. Employers, however, worry about communication delays. Career advisors suggest setting weekly goals and documenting outcomes to make remote experience visible in future interviews.

questions.question: What do career advisors recommend?
options: Set weekly goals and record results
